text.title: hybrid-delivery Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for hybrid-delivery as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agile metrics (story points, velocity) presented directly to a steering committee that thinks in deliverables and labour cost.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Executive audiences interpret story points as arbitrary numbers; without translation they discount the data or demand a switch to hours, undermining agile capacity planning.

failure-mode.description: Applying Earned Value Management metrics (CPI, SPI computed from story-points × hourly rate) to the agile arm without an explicitly agreed conversion.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Story points are a relative planning unit, not a labour-cost proxy; EVM computed from them produces numbers that look precise but are meaningless, and finance will hold the PM accountable for them.

failure-mode.description: Hybrid chosen as a political compromise rather than a risk-profile decision.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: PMO-wants-control + teams-want-autonomy resolved by "we do hybrid" produces neither the governance of predictive nor the adaptability of agile — it produces incoherence dressed as methodology.

failure-mode.description: Agile coach distrusts gantts; PM distrusts standups.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The dominant cultural failure in hybrid programs. The solution is cross-training: PMs shadow stand-ups, coaches attend gate reviews. Neither arm is optional.

failure-mode.description: Governance drift: the predictive arm enforces a stage gate, the agile arm flies through it; or vice versa, agile is gated to a quarterly cadence and dies.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Gate frequency must match risk profile, not legacy habit or org politics. Misalignment between arms destroys the coherence that hybrid promises.
